input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.4.5.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.4.5.2
            TITLE: the available measurement voltages are 250 v and 500 v. all vehicles with a maximum

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.4.5.2: The available measurement voltages are 250 V and 500 V. All vehicles with a maximum
IN.4.5.2 The available measurement voltages are 250 V and 500 V. All vehicles with a maximum 
nominal operation voltage below 500 V will be measured with the next available voltage level.    
All teams with a system voltage of 500 V or more will be measured with 500 V.

final_answer: The available measurement voltages are 250 V and 500 V. All vehicles with a maximum nominal operation voltage below 500 V will be measured with the next available voltage level. All teams with a system voltage of 500 V or more will be measured with 500 V.
